## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Lightspeed and fwd.digital for AI-enabled content creation and workflow automation.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers end-to-end AI-enabled services for content creation, strategy, and workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [They can work with existing tools (e.g. Salesforce, Outreach) or build custom solutions using various AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Lightspeed is exploring AI tools (including AirOps) but needs help with strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [fwd.digital positions themselves as strategic partners who can both execute and enable teams to become more AI-native](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Service Offerings

  - [Content creation and strategy: Developing keyword strategies, executing content at scale (e.g., 10,000+ pages for Hagen)](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [AI-enabled workflows: Custom solutions for sales follow-ups, CRM enrichment, copywriting improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Flexible engagement models: Can work within client instances or provide managed services](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [End-to-end execution: Not just strategy, but full implementation with dedicated managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Differentiation from AirOps

  - [More strategic partnership beyond just technical implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Team includes former VPs of Marketing, Growth heads, and CMOs with go-to-market expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Can build solutions beyond AirOps platform, integrating multiple tools and custom APIs](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Focuses on best practices and tailored solutions, not just technology implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

### Integration with Existing Tools

  - [Can work with Lightspeed's current tech stack (Salesforce, Outreach, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Aims to leverage existing tools and data rather than introducing new technologies](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Offers to potentially help Lightspeed save money on tool investments](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

### Lightspeed's Current AI Initiatives

  - [Exploring various AI tools, including AirOps and Salesforce's AI offerings (Agent Force, Copilot)](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Challenges with tool ownership and long-term resource allocation for new technologies](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Need for external expertise to bridge marketing goals with technical capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lightspeed team to regroup and discuss how to proceed, considering ongoing AirOps discussions](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting recording for team members who couldn't attend](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Potential follow-up to discuss specific use cases and scope of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Consider a shared call with AirOps to explore collaboration options](https://fathom.video/share/Q3xpVfA-S4KyU43szD16R19SavgqKKzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
